briefing: Markets were flat to slightly negative today (NASDAQ ~0.0%, S&P 500 -0.2%), a neutral day with no broad risk-on signal. We held our six existing positions and added one high-conviction buy, VSXY, which was the only candidate showing all four bullish confirmation signals at once.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Rather than buying on a single bullish clue, disciplined traders look for several indicators — like RSI, MACD, price versus moving average, and volume — to all line up together. When multiple independent signals agree, it lowers the odds of a false start and points to genuine institutional buying interest, as with VSXY today.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 有紀律的交易者不會只憑單一利多訊號進場，而是會等待多項指標——例如RSI、MACD、股價與均線的關係、成交量——同時發出一致訊號。當多個獨立指標互相印證時，代表假訊號的機率較低，也更可能反映真實的機構買盤，就像今日的VSXY一樣。

market_education.summary_en: Major indices traded essentially flat, with the S&P 500 dipping a modest 0.2% and the NASDAQ roughly unchanged, indicating a lack of strong directional conviction among investors today. Trading activity across most sectors was muted, consistent with a wait-and-see posture ahead of upcoming economic data and earnings. In the absence of a clear catalyst, individual stock momentum — rather than broad market direction — drove today's standout movers like VSXY.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日大盤走勢大致持平，標普500指數小跌0.2%，納指幾乎沒有變化，反映投資人普遍缺乏明確方向感。大部分板塊交投淡靜，市場呈現觀望氣氛，等待即將公布的經濟數據與企業財報。在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下，個股動能（而非大盤走勢）主導了今日如VSXY等表現突出的股票。

trades.reasoning: VSXY shows full multi-signal confirmation (RSI 65.7 in bullish zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge), matching our highest-conviction setup even though the broader market is neutral.
